commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=53b134bdf49922d204aaca79f111c6975cca9328)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a Feishu inbound runtime guard, propagates runtime-not-ready errors through message dispatch paths, updates the receive handler, and adds a mocked regression test.

PR surface: Source +57, Tests +37. Total +94 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source-level yes for the PR defect: production monitor startup defaults to fire-and-forget, while the new rethrow only runs in the awaited path. I did not run a live Feishu gateway reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR has a concrete P1 production-path defect and still lacks external real behavior proof, so it needs contributor/maintainer follow-up rather than an automated repair marker.

target.title: fix(feishu): add defensive check for channel runtime initialization #87646
target.body:
## What

Fixes #87646. Ensures missing `core.channel.inbound.run` during Feishu cold starts produces a retryable non-2xx response instead of silently dropping messages.

## How — Error Propagation Chain

The fix ensures runtime-not-ready errors propagate through **all 4 handler layers** to the webhook HTTP response:

1. **`getChannelInboundRun()`** (bot.ts) — throws when `core.channel.inbound.run` is missing
2. **`handleFeishuMessage()`** catch (bot.ts) — selectively rethrows `channel runtime not ready`
3. **`processMessage()`** catch (monitor.message-handler.ts) — selectively rethrows so the webhook handler gets the error
4. **Broadcast paths** (bot.ts) — sequential: rethrows per-agent; parallel: propagates if ALL agents fail

All 3 dispatch paths (DM, broadcast-active, broadcast-observer) are covered.

## Test

Updated regression test expects `rejects.toThrow(/channel runtime not ready/)`.

## Behavioral Proof

When `core.channel.inbound.run` is undefined:
- Guard throws with diagnostic log (channel/inbound key state)
- Error propagates through all handler layers (4 selective rethrows)
- Webhook handler returns non-2xx → Feishu retries the message
- Dedupe claim is released before rethrow (no stale locks)
- Messages are NOT dropped or marked as processed

> **Note:** Live Feishu gateway proof is not available in this contributor's environment (WeChat/Telegram only). The fix is validated through source analysis, handler chain tracing, and mocked tests. A maintainer with a Feishu gateway can verify by checking that cold-start messages produce retryable 5xx responses.

## Changes

| File | Lines | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `bot.ts` | +34/-5 | `getChannelInboundRun` throws + 3 guard call sites + outer catch rethrow + broadcast rethrow |
| `bot.test.ts` | +37/-1 | Updated regression test |
| `monitor.message-handler.ts` | +5/-1 | `processMessage()` catch rethrow |
target.author: comeran
